ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., stock, currency, commodity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* ISIN (International Securities Identification Number) of the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector of the instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry of the instrument */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the instrument is based */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the instrument's data was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the instrument (e.g., active, delisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeframes" (
  "timeframe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timeframe */,
  "timeframe_name" TEXT /* Name of the timeframe (e.g., 1H, 1D, 1W) */,
  "timeframe_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the timeframe (e.g., 1 hour, 1 day, 1 week) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeframe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "timeframe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timeframe */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Open price at the beginning of the timeframe */,
  "high_price" REAL /* High price during the timeframe */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Low price during the timeframe */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Close price at the end of the timeframe */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted close price (if applicable) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume traded during the timeframe */,
  "premarket_open_price" REAL /* Open price in the pre-market session */,
  "postmarket_close_price" REAL /* Close price in the post-market session */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume Weighted Average Price */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest for futures and options */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the market data was updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the market data (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_timeframe_id FOREIGN KEY ("timeframe_id") REFERENCES timeframes ("timeframe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* The exact time when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device" TEXT /* The device type used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading signal (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "signal_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was generated */,
  "signal_price" REAL /* Price at which the signal was generated */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Strength of the signal (e.g., confidence level) */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* The trading strategy used to generate the signal */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* The confidence level of the signal (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the trading signal (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., SMA, EMA, RSI) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was calculated */,
  "indicator_period" INTEGER /* The period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the technical indicator (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price threshold, volume spike) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* The severity level of the alert (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  "triggered_by" TEXT /* The user or system that triggered the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* The date and time the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)
